title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 507.180 - Guardian, conservator and next friend liable for costs
text:
507.180.  Guardian, conservator and next friend liable for costs. — The guardian, conservator, or next friend of any infant who commences or prosecutes a suit shall be responsible for the costs thereof, unless such infant be permitted by the court to sue as a poor person, as provided by law.
(RSMo 1939 § 866, A.L. 1983 S.B. 44 & 45) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 715; 1919 § 1172; 1909 § 1746
